name: Calico Fruit Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Iceberg Lettuce Chunks (Otherwise Known As Head Lettuce)
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------Peanut Butter Dressing---------------------------
1/4 cup Peanut Butter
3 tablespoons Honey
1/4 cup Milk
1/2 cup Miracle Whip Salad Dressing
For the Salad:
Combine the lettuce and fruit, tossing lightly to mix.
For the Dressing:
1. Combine the peanut butter and honey in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the milk while stirring.
3. Add the Miracle Whip salad dressing and mix well until thoroughly blended.
4. Chill until serving time.
Variation:
The dressing may also be served as a dip with apple and pear slices or banana chunks.
